title: ageratina neriifolia
intro: Ageratina neriifolia, also known as 'Neriifolia Sage' or 'Mexican Mountain Mint', is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Ageratina neriifolia include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce fever, and support immune function. Ageratina neriifolia can be prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or it can be used in herbal capsules or supplements to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
